channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Sensor not working properly for light phasing, 25th March
item.description:
When cars approach Kilburn high Road from Brondesbury Road, the traffic light sensor does not always appear to detect their presence. This can result in the traffic lights remaining stuck on red for cars exiting Brondesbury Road onto Kilburn high Road, and the lights simply cycling between a green light for All traffic on Kilburn high Road and a green man for all pedestrians crossing the road but no greenlight for cars exiting Brondesbury Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2a, Brondesbury Road, Queen's Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on the street, 25th March
item.description:
There was a dead fox on the pavement outside our property this morning. A passer by knocked to tell me. I have put it in a sturdy binbag.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oaklands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal fly tipping happening on a daily basis, 25th March
item.description:
Illegal fly tipping happening on a daily basis. People keeps throwing all sort of rubbish on a public walk path. From fridges, to chandeliers, cooking oil and much more This needs to stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morley Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water Leak emerging through road surface, 25th March
item.description:
Has been there for many weeks. Thames Water are aware but no action has been taken.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Houndsden Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple black bin bags thrown on the path, 25th March
item.description:
Been here since last night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van obstructing car park, 25th March
item.description:
This van has been abandoned in the public car park for many months. It is blocking proper use of the car park. There are two other abandoned cars also in the car park, as well as an abandoned lorry. The residents of our street are unable to use the car park as it is being used as storage of untaxed cars. This has been an ongoing issue for over two years, please fix this!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip blocking pathway., 25th March
item.description:
Approximately 20 black bags of domestic waste and various household items.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Treveris Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree on the left-hand lane just before traffic lights, 25th March
item.description:
Low hanging tree affecting buses operating on green lanes. had a broken window on 141 bus on 24/03/2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large potholes which require swerving in the road, 25th March
item.description:
Large potholes, reported last year and still not resolved and getting significantly worse, there is a depression going across the road meaning there is no path to avoid a deep pothole when cycling, the picture is from google and the area is much worse than the photo, requires urgent resurfacing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Snowsfields, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crater potholes damaging cars, 25th March
item.description:
Deep potholes in between Trewsbury house & Penton House. Been like this since last year 2025, markings were made to resurface, all residents moved their cars for the work to be carried out. The team didn’t start or complete the job. Our cars are being damaged due to this and the potholes are becoming even bigger/greater. This must to be fixed ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartslock Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned works materials, 25th March
item.description:
Abandoned works materials

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grangehill Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12inch pothole on Goodhart Way road repair - outside 144, 25th March
item.description:
This pothole is growing in size and my whole house shakes when cars pass over it. It's a road channel repair that spans across the carriageway - approximately outside 144.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Goodhart Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside hospice, 25th March
item.description:
Outside Greenwich and Bexley hospice

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 25th March
item.description:
Dumped on the pavement on woodhurst Road near junction to Brookedene Road. Bags seem to be filled with a mix of household, clothes and food. Thanks 🙏🏽

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodhurst Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Steps at end of Well Passage io Well Road, 25th March
item.description:
Lowest step very deep - about twice height of 2 upper steps. Makes it very difficult for less mobile elderly or younger people. Risk of falling over and injury. Easily fixable by putting a further step below the existing ones.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Well Passage, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crater like potholes to the left of Trewsbury House, 25th March
item.description:
Deep potholes in between Trewsbury house & Penton House. Been like this since last year 2025, markings were made to resurface, all residents moved their cars for the work to be carried out. The team didn’t start or complete the job. Our cars are being damaged due to this and the potholes are becoming even bigger/greater. This must to be fixed ASAP.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartslock Drive, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pots & rubbish left outside property, 25th March
item.description:
Was a makeshift garden now has just been left in disrepair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Richmond Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 25th March
item.description:
Please remove fly tip next to coop car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dittisham Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked gullies, 25th March
item.description:
Several blocked gullies on Cheviot road which have been blocked for some years. Water does not drain off them which causes flooding. They are outside 42,46 and 52 Cheviot road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cheviot Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering, 25th March
item.description:
Littering next to bin on top of bin and over path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harry Zeital Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
